title: Session cleanup dialog component with archive, delete, keep, and archive-continue options
purpose: Provides a UI dialog for users to choose how to handle a collab session, offering options to archive, delete, keep, or archive and continue with the session.
module_context: Exports a React functional component SessionCleanupDialog that accepts session data, action handlers, and processing state to render a dialog with four cleanup options and a confirmation flow.

steps.content: Initialize the selected action state to null.
Define the confirm handler that triggers the action callback with the selected action.
Create an array of action objects with labels, descriptions, and icons for each cleanup option.
Render a modal dialog with session name header, action buttons, and footer controls.
Display each action button with visual selection state and appropriate styling.
Render a footer with cancel and confirm buttons, disabling them during processing.
